title: Documentation, Change, Lifecycle, and Monitoring · Packet Lens: Net Flow Packet Baseline
summary: Operate a living network source of truth with baselines, telemetry, alerts, configuration, and service ownership. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net flow packet baseline increment in an operations and observability runbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine flow data, packet capture, interface metrics, and baselines to distinguish conversation, content, and anomaly evidence.
Use SNMP v2c or v3, MIBs, polling, traps, community or user security, and management scope appropriately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
